name: AI Portfolio Chat
description: A RAG-powered conversational portfolio website that answers questions about my career using retrieval-augmented generation. Features streaming responses, source citations, and a PII safety layer. Built with Next.js App Router, Vercel AI SDK, Pinecone, and Tailwind CSS.

name: Enterprise RAG Search
description: Internal knowledge base search engine at TechCorp AI. Indexes 500k+ documents across Confluence, Notion, and Slack. Uses hybrid search (vector + BM25) with re-ranking. Achieved 92% relevance score on internal benchmarks. Handles multi-tenant isolation via Pinecone namespaces.

name: Real-time Fraud Monitor
description: Event-driven fraud detection dashboard at BigBank Financial. Ingests transaction events from Kafka, applies ML scoring in real-time, and surfaces suspicious activity to analysts. Reduced average investigation time from 45 minutes to 25 minutes.

name: CollabBoard
description: Real-time collaborative whiteboard application built at StartupXYZ. Supports simultaneous editing by 50+ users with conflict-free replicated data types (CRDTs). WebSocket-based sync with offline support and automatic reconnection.
